response.overview: Aooo releases their highly anticipated 2nd album, "Rooom." This latest album, released in 2025, includes tracks such as "Mahou wa Spice," "Yankeee," "Geeek," "CRAZZZY," and "Star Sign," showcasing the band's current position. The limited first edition B includes footage from the sold-out Aooo Live Tour "BAKUBAKU" performance at Zepp Shinjuku (TOKYO) on September 16, 2025. This deluxe edition allows you to experience the excitement of Aooo, a band that is rapidly growing as a live act.
response.title: Aooo - Aooo Live Tour "BAKUBAKU"
